rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed both task objectives. (1) DB Console: created an Ingress resource routing crdb-ui.example.com to crdb-cluster-public:8080 with TLS termination; HTTP returns 308 (redirect to HTTPS), which falls within the oracle's 200–399 passing range. (2) SQL TCP exposure: created/updated the tcp-services ConfigMap mapping port 26257 to cockroachdb/crdb-cluster-public:26257, patched the ingress-nginx deployment to load that ConfigMap and expose the port, and patched the Service to add port 26257. Verification confirmed nginx.conf contains the TCP 26257 proxy block, and a live cockroach sql query through the ingress returned '1' successfully. Oracle verdict: pass.
